#  MAGIC:  
Zukunft of  
Quantum
[ Join now ](https://eleqtron.com/en/)
Quantum computing is the future. And we at eleQtron are shaping it today!
## Next generation quantum computing
eleQtron develops and operates quantum computers. Our computing machines will be able to solve problems, outperforming the best conventional supercomputers. To do this, we use the quantum states of ions controlled by established and miniaturized microwave technology. A unique concept we call MAGIC (Magnetic Gradient Induced Coupling).
![eleQtron Quantencomputer in einem Weißraum bei DLR Hamburg](https://eleqtron.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/home-hero-eleqtron-quantum-computer-hh-250318.jpg)
## Ready for the quantum revolution?
Quantum computers will change our lives in many areas. They are capable of handling the most complex tasks quickly and efficiently. And they are far superior to even the best supercomputers when it comes to special problems. Calculations that today still take days, months or even years can be performed millions of times faster with quantum computers.
### Powerful, user-oriented and practical.
Based on our MAGIC concept, we are developing quantum computers specifically tailored to solve commercial problems. The potential is huge, since they enable enormous progress in a wide range of fields: from materials research, logistics or supply chain management in industry to individualized products in the pharmaceutical sector to Big Data and risk management in finance.
### Worldwide unique technology.
Our qubits can be controlled with microwaves using the MAGIC technology. This is not only more precise, but also much more robust compared to laser control of qubits. And, above all, excellently scalable.
### Pioneers in quantum computing.
As the first German commercial hardware manufacturer in the industry, eleQtron is setting standards in the field of quantum computing. The international race for the industrial realization of the new technologies has long since begun. And we are right at the forefront!
Our goal is to make computing time on quantum computers available to companies, institutions and science.
[ Learn more ](https://eleqtron.com/en/product/)
## Latest Press Releases
Current press releases on our quantum computer developments, partnerships and company news. Direct access to official statements and background information for your reporting.
[ ![](https://eleqtron.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/20260430_Pressemitteilung_eleQtron_SeriesA-thumbnail-300x214.jpg) ](https://eleqtron.com/en/quantum-computing-scale-up-eleqtron-secures-57-million-in-one-of-the-largest-series-a-funding-rounds-worldwide/)

5. May 2026

[ To the press page ](https://eleqtron.com/en/press/)
## This is eleQtron
At eleQtron, expertise meets vision. Founded in 2020 as a spin-off from cutting-edge research, the startup has since grown into a company comprising over 90 international experts. With more than 50 million euros in order volume and strong investors at our side, we are shaping the future of quantum computing.
Together with their team, Jan Leise, Michael Johanning, and Kaoru Naganuma are making the quantum revolution a reality—will you join us?
[ More about us ](https://eleqtron.com/en/company/)

## The quantum revolution:  
This is where we're at
  * ##  [ 1st German Quantum Computer ](https://eleqtron.com/en/ "1st German Quantum Computer")
First complete demonstration of the MAGIC concept. In subsequent years, the focus shifted towards quantum algorithms.
  * ##  [ Founding of eleQtron ](https://eleqtron.com/en/ "Founding of eleQtron")
eleQtron GmbH was founded on May 12, 2020, followed by the establishment of a strong team.
  * ##  [ Strong Investors ](https://eleqtron.com/en/ "Strong Investors")
eleQtron secures a €16 million seed investment led by renowned VC firm Earlybird.
  * ##  [ 1st Major Order ](javascript:; "1st Major Order")
Sale of quantum computers within the scope of QCI / Qsea project to the German Aerospace Center (DLR).
  * ##  [ Second Location ](javascript:; "Second Location")
Opening of an additional office in Hamburg, featuring strong local experts.
  * ##  [ Further Major Orders ](javascript:; "Further Major Orders")
Sale of quantum computers to Forschungszentrum Jülich as part of the HiQ project for integration into the Jülich supercomputer cluster.
  * ##  [ Technology Pioneer 2025 ](javascript:; "Technology Pioneer 2025")
eleQtron selected as Technology Pioneer 2025 by the World Economic Forum


## Shape your future with us.
Together we think big! To support our international team, we at eleQtron are looking for bright and creative minds who want to shape the future of quantum computing with us.
[ Discover opportunities now ](https://eleqtron.com/en/career/)
![](https://eleqtron.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/home-career-after-work.jpg)
##  Learn more?
Too many ideas, too little space on a website. So let’s talk!
[ Get in touch ](https://eleqtron.com/en/contact/)
